title: Repo-wide graph rule scope with cross-epic example
description:
Extend graph rules with a repository-wide scope so rulesets can express checks across unlinked issues, and ship a cross-epic contradiction example.

## Background

Graph rules currently resolve only within an issue's linked dependency graph (`scope = "linked"`), so overlapping or colliding requirement ids across independent epics are inexpressible.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Applicable graph rule kinds accept a repo-wide scope in addition to linked scope
- [ ] An example ruleset under docs/examples/ detects requirement-id collisions or duplicated ownership across unlinked parent issues
- [ ] Validation remains performant on repositories with hundreds of issues (measured, not assumed)
- [ ] Scope semantics are documented in the configuration reference
